description_long: A futuristic adult male figure is dressed in a form-fitting, armored bodysuit with reinforced panels and angular design elements, suggesting advanced protection. He wears a beret and has a tactical, high-tech appearance, with a visible exoskeletal arm attachment on his left forearm that glows with an orange hue, possibly indicating an energy or mechanical enhancement. The right hand is extended forward, gripping a compact, sci-fi style firearm, while a large rifle is slung across his back. The suit features various utility pouches, metallic accents, and integrated technology, giving a militaristic and urban combat vibe. His boots are robust and armored, suitable for rough terrain or urban environments. The overall impression is of a highly trained operative or soldier equipped for advanced urban operations.
description: A futuristic male figure in a tactical armored suit with a glowing exoskeletal arm, holding a sci-fi firearm and carrying a rifle on his back. The outfit and accessories suggest a high-tech urban combat operative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, beret, armored suit details, glowing exoskeletal arm, and firearm held forward.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlights the exoskeletal arm, rifle on the back, and the figure's stance with the firearm extended.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the rifle slung across the back, armored suit contours, and the back of the beret.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the firearm in hand, side profile of the armored suit, and the glowing exoskeletal arm.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored bodysuit with reinforced panels, tactical accessories, and a beret
attribute_posture: standing with right arm extended forward, holding a firearm
